channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Women Leading the Way in Nigeria’s Skitmaking Industry in 2026
item.description: For long time, skit-making for Naija been mostly men dem business, with big names like Broda Shaggy and Mr Macaroni dey control the space. But as e be now, women don dey change the game well well. Lad...

item.title: Proteas return home after T20 World Cup amid Middle East travel disruption
item.description: Nearly a week after their exit from the T20 World Cup, the South African Proteas are finally heading home. The team had been stranded in Kolkata due to widespread flight cancellations caused by the on...

item.title: Cornwall woman, 73, returns safely to UK after being stranded in Dubai amid Iran conflict flight disruptions
item.description: Lenise Blom, a 73-year-old woman from Truro in Cornwall, has safely returned to the United Kingdom after being stranded in Dubai for eight days due to the escalating conflict involving Iran. She had b...

item.title: Trump claims US involvement in Iran's leadership as Middle East conflict escalates
item.description: Former US President Donald Trump has stated he wants the United States to have a role in determining Iran's next supreme leader following the death of Ali Khamenei. Trump dismissed Mojtaba Khamenei, t...

item.title: Aden Duale’s Security Team Involved in Kisumu-Busia Road Accident, 3 Fatalities Confirmed
item.description: On Sunday, March 8, 2026, Health Cabinet Secretary Aden Duale's security vehicle was involved in a road accident in the Otonglo area near the Molasses Plant along Kisumu-Busia Road. The team was retur...

item.title: Kehinde Adegbodu Mourns Passing of Twin Brother Taiwo
item.description: Gospel singer Kehinde Adegbodu don talk about the pain wey him dey feel after him twin brother and music partner, Taiwo Adegbodu, pass away. Kehinde share old photos of Taiwo for their Adegbodu Twins ...

item.title: Calgary imposes water restrictions as Bearspaw feeder main undergoes repairs
item.description: Calgary residents will face new water restrictions starting Monday due to ongoing repairs on the Bearspaw feeder main, a key water supply line for the city. City crews have initiated maintenance work ...

item.title: Yanga writes to TPLB over disciplinary and refereeing concerns
item.description: Young Africans (Yanga) football club has formally written to the Competition Management Committee of the Tanzania Premier League Board (TPLB) asking for clarification on five main issues that have cau...

item.title: DCP Abubakar Appointed Head of IGP Monitoring Unit Following Fakorede’s Removal
item.description: The Nigeria Police Force (NPF) don make fresh postings for some senior officers. Deputy Commissioner of Police Aliyu Abubakar don get appointed as Head of the IGP Monitoring Unit, also known as the Po...

item.title: British Columbia adopts permanent daylight saving time amid local and cross-border considerations
item.description: British Columbia has announced that it will maintain daylight saving time permanently, ending the biannual clock changes that have long been a feature of life in the province. Historically, Creston, a...

item.title: Research Reveals Presence of Potentially Harmful Chemicals in Menstrual Products
item.description: Approximately half of the world’s population experiences menstruation during their lifetime. Disposable menstrual products like tampons and pads are commonly used to manage menstrual flow. Recent stud...

item.title: Incorporating Pucci Prints Into Home Décor for Colourful, Curved Interiors
item.description: As Canadians emerge from a long winter, adding vibrant Pucci prints to interiors offers a way to bring the warmth and energy of summer indoors. Pucci, the Italian brand founded by Emilio Pucci in 1947...

item.title: Alberta and Montana work towards resolving cross-border electricity challenges
item.description: Alberta and Montana have had a tense relationship over electricity trade, with Montana politicians expressing concerns that Alberta's rules sometimes prevent Montana electricity from entering the prov...

item.title: Accenture Acquires Ookla’s Connectivity Services to Support AI and Enterprise Networks
item.description: Ziff Davis announced the sale of its Connectivity division, which includes well-known services like Ookla’s Speedtest and DownDetector, as well as Ekahau and RootMetrics, to Accenture for $1.2 billion...

item.title: Nairobi Woman Drowns During Heavy Rains While Trying to Visit Her Child
item.description: During the heavy rains in Nairobi on March 6, 2026, Rose Akamurana tragically lost her life after being swept away by floodwaters while travelling from Athi River to Kawangware to meet her child. A ph...

item.title: Italy Pledges Support to Gulf Allies Amid Rising Iran Tensions
item.description: US President Donald Trump commended Italian Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni for showing readiness to assist the United States and Israel amid escalating tensions with Iran. During a phone interview with...

item.title: Armed Attack on Police in Lakki Marwat Leaves Civilian Dead and Cop Injured
item.description: In Lakki Marwat district of Khyber Pakhtunkhwa, a tragic incident occurred when armed men on motorcycles opened fire on a police patrol in Serai Naurang town. A civilian was killed in the attack, whil...

item.title: Simon Tisdall argues that Britain should view Donald Trump as an enemy due to the illegal US-Israel war on Iran
item.description: In this opinion piece, Guardian commentator Simon Tisdall criticises the ongoing US-Israel war against Iran, now in its ninth day, as unjustified, illegal, and increasingly disproportionate. He descri...

item.title: NSW Housing Delivery Authority enables larger redevelopment projects in Sydney
item.description: Developers in New South Wales are increasingly taking advantage of the Housing Delivery Authority (HDA) pathway, a state government initiative designed to accelerate housing projects. Since its creati...

item.title: Court Upholds Conviction of Former Principal in Student Assault Case
item.description: The High Court has rejected the appeal by a former principal who was seeking to overturn his conviction for assaulting a student. The ex-headteacher, from a school in Kenya, had pleaded not guilty but...
